title: ReActReturn
description: Return payload for the ReAct agent. Validated before persistence per RFC 0003 §D.

answer.description: Final synthesized answer to the user's goal.

steps.description: Ordered Reason+Act trace. Each entry pairs a Thought with the Action taken (tool call) and the Observation returned. The terminal step is the final-answer Action.

stoppedReason.description: Why the loop terminated. `completed` = produced a final answer; `max_steps` = hit the cap; `tool_error` = unrecoverable tool failure; `refused` = agent declined for safety.

confidence.description: Agent's self-reported confidence in the final answer. Drives escalation per RFC 0002 §F.

observation.description: Result returned by the tool call. Omitted when the action is finalAnswer.
